name: Halikar
description: This jet powered Grineer throwing mace always comes back to its master and is even capable of disarming targets.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This jet powered Grineer throwing mace always comes back to its master and is even capable of disarming targets.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed disarming an Acolyte with the Halikar or Halikar Wraith replacing your secondary weapon with a Rank 0 version of the Acolyte’s weapon.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Hotfix 30.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed disarming a Deimos Tendril Drone with Loki's Disarm or with a Halikar, resulting in a floating shock baton appearing above the enemy.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Halikar Wraith not having the correct Riven Disposition.
Fixed inability to Chat Link the Halikar Wraith. 
Fixed audio issues with the Halikar Wraith.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Updated Halikars thrown hit effects to be more in-line with other projectile effects.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Demolysts can no longer be disarmed by the Halikar, as they stop attacking the Conduit. This follows precedent with Demolysts already being immune to the effects of Loki's and Mesa's disarm abilities.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with the Halikar's sound FX staying on forever if it's thrown and the owner falls into a teleport volume.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to put Sentient parts on your Warframe by throwing the Halikar at a Sentient and then switching to Operator before it returns. While we understand this was pretty cool, it was broken in many ways. We will aim to revisit as a feature when more time emerges.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Halikar’s visual effects

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.1.0 Ash Revisited
patchlogs.changes: Halikar disarm chance is now 100% in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.0.7 - Valkyr Prime
patchlogs.changes: Increased projectile damage of Halikar and Kestrel in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Removed auto-targeting of Halikar and Kestrel in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Halikar doing 10 throw damage. Increased base throw damage to 150.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Halikar now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5
patchlogs.additions: •    The Halikar now has a folding animation!
patchlogs.changes: •    Reduced the Halikar’s auto-targeting mechanic to mimic other thrown type (Glaive, Kestrel, etc.) melee weapons.
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Halikar explosions doing no damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Halikar weapon sounds looping when the player is interrupted during a jump strike.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Halikar jump strike sound effects getting stuck on a continuous loop.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with colour customization not working on the Halikar.
